entity.label: Baalath
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town of the tribe of Dan (Josh. 19:44). It was fortified by Solomon (1 Kings 9:18; 2 Chr. 8:6). Some have identified it with Bel’ain, in Wady Deir Balut.

nodes.label: Baalath
nodes.description: A town of the tribe of Dan (Josh. 19:44). It was fortified by Solomon (1 Kings 9:18; 2 Chr. 8:6). Some have identified it with Bel’ain, in Wady Deir Balut.

verses.text: And Eltekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,
